message:
Command `
# Search workspace broadly for nc_chipgen output structures
echo "=== Workspace top-level ==="
ls /workspace/

echo ""
echo "=== Looking for any openlane config.json files ==="
find /workspace -name "config.json" -path "*/openlane/*" 2>/dev/null | head -30

echo ""
echo "=== Looking for any *_mcu directories ==="
find /workspace -maxdepth 3 -type d -name "*mcu*" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Looking for any *_wrapper or *_chip directories ==="
find /workspace -maxdepth 5 -type d \( -name "*_wrapper" -o -name "*_chip" \) 2>/dev/null | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== Looking for mspm33 anywhere ==="
find /workspace -maxdepth 4 -name "*mspm33*" 2>/dev/null | head -20
` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "
# Search workspace broadly for nc_chipgen output structures
echo "=== Workspace top-level ==="
ls /workspace/

echo ""
echo "=== Looking for any openlane config.json files ==="
find /workspace -name "config.json" -path "*/openlane/*" 2>/dev/null | head -30

echo ""
echo "=== Looking for any *_mcu directories ==="
find /workspace -maxdepth 3 -type d -name "*mcu*" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Looking for any *_wrapper or *_chip directories ==="
find /workspace -maxdepth 5 -type d \( -name "*_wrapper" -o -name "*_chip" \) 2>/dev/null | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== Looking for mspm33 anywhere ==="
find /workspace -maxdepth 4 -name "*mspm33*" 2>/dev/null | head -20
"}
